query: deep learning for medical image analysis

results.title: A Perspective on Deep Imaging
results.summary: the combination of tomographic imaging and deep learning, or machine learning in general, promises to empower not only image analysis but also image reconstruction . this direction might lead to intelligent utilization of domain knowledge from big data, innovative approaches for image reconstruction and superior performance in clinical imaging .
results.genai_brief: the combination of tomographic imaging and deep learning promises to empower not only image analysis but also image reconstruction . this direction might lead to intelligent utilization of domain knowledge from big data, innovative approaches for image reconstruction and superior performance in clinical imaging .

results.title:
Convolutional Neural Networks for Medical Image Analysis: Full Training
  or Fine Tuning?
results.summary: training a deep convolutional neural network from scratch is difficult because it requires a large amount of labeled training data and a great deal of expertise . however, the substantial differences between natural and medical images may advise against such knowledge transfer .
results.genai_brief: convolutional neural networks for medical image analysis are difficult because it requires a large amount of labeled training data and a great deal of expertise . the substantial differences between natural and medical images may advise against such knowledge transfer .

results.title:
Classification of MRI data using Deep Learning and Gaussian
  Process-based Model Selection
results.summary: the classification of MRI images according to the anatomical field of view is a necessary task to solve when faced with the increasing quantity of medical images . advances in deep learning make it a suitable tool for computer vision problems .
results.genai_brief: the classification of MRI images according to the anatomical field of view is a necessary task to solve . advances in deep learning make it a suitable tool for computer vision problems .

results.title:
High-Resolution Breast Cancer Screening with Multi-View Deep
  Convolutional Neural Networks
results.summary: the majority of the initial attempts focused on replacing the input of a deep convolutional neural network with a medical image . fine details are necessary for detection in medical images, unlike natural images where coarse structures matter most .
results.genai_brief: the majority of the initial attempts focused on replacing the input of a deep convolutional neural network with a medical image . fine details are necessary for detection in medical images unlike natural images where coarse structures matter most .

results.title: Deep Learning for the Classification of Lung Nodules
results.summary: deep learning has attracted a rapidly increasing attention in the field of medical imaging . we develop a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) and apply it to thoracic CT images for classification of lung nodules .
results.genai_brief: deep learning has attracted a rapidly increasing attention in the field of medical imaging . we develop a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) and apply it to thoracic CT images .
